title: High Speed Rail Bridge (with Pillars) - By Skywalker_6517
description: Lets users build bridges with the Minecraft Transit Railway mod.
body:
This pack is for users who want to build realistic bridges in Minecraft for trains. The pack features catenaries (overhead wires) and pillars for the bridges.

Please note:
- The pack **requires the Minecraft Transit Railway mod version MTR4** to run
- **These bridges spawn as a train and you can select and duplicate segments**
- There are 4 varients of the segments (default, pillar, catenary, pillar + catenary) with A + B varients for left side and right side
- 2 additional varients of segments are included for curves to avoid issues with turn radii
- If you use pillars on curves with different radii, please only use segments without pillars and place another track for the pillar only segment in between the 2 existing tracks for the bridge
- The catenary height is placed at 5 blocks
- Siding rails cannot overlap, place the nodes one block behind the other to minimise offset
